division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
text: All fees required to be paid by an automobile dismantler, in accordance with this code, for any license, or special plates, shall be paid at the time application is made to the department.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 6. Registration and Weight Fees [9101 - 9808]
#### Article 4. Payment of Fees [9550 - 9564]
##### § 9551

All fees required to be paid by an automobile dismantler, in accordance with this code, for any license, or special plates, shall be paid at the time application is made to the department.

*(Amended by Stats. 1971, Ch. 1214.)*

subsections.text: All fees required to be paid by an automobile dismantler, in accordance with this code, for any license, or special plates, shall be paid at the time application is made to the department.
